title: Repurposed Structures - Gazebo Compat Datapack
description: Add Gazebos to Repurposed Structure's villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Gazebo mod. You will find gazebos in RS's Overworld Villages!


- Gazebo mod can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos)

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/repurposed-structures-fabric



![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H0lxoIBE/images/26a68f6985995d839eefcf6b9baea3db804e5a98.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H0lxoIBE/images/26a68f6985995d839eefcf6b9baea3db804e5a98.png)



**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
